name: Sensitive Data Staging
description: Detects copying of multiple sensitive files to staging directories
query:
// Data Staging Detection
// Multiple sensitive files copied to temp/staging locations
events from endpoint
where event_type in ("file_copy", "file_create")
  and destination_path contains ("temp", "tmp", "staging", "export")
  and file_extension in ("xlsx", "docx", "pdf", "csv", "sql", "db")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) > 20
within 300 seconds
